name: Light Wyrm
tips: Every Wyrm you discard makes it cheaper — a discard-heavy game plan turns it into a 1-2 mana 33🗡️/33🤍.
Discarding Light Wyrm itself is often correct: from the Exhaust Pile it plays for a further 2 less, and its own discard counts toward the per-Wyrm discount.
The Dark Wyrm line: discard Light Wyrm + 2 other Wyrms to summon Dark Wyrm for free — Light Wyrm then costs 5−3−2 = 0 from the Exhaust Pile.
Tree Wyrm's tutor fetches Light Wyrms to keep the discard engine fed.
rulings: Cost: reduced by 1 for each Wyrm-tribe card in YOUR Exhaust Pile (discards go there, revealed). Copies of Light Wyrm itself count.

While Light Wyrm is in your Exhaust Pile you may summon it from there for its effective cost minus a further 2 (never below 0). This consumes your turn action and runs the normal summon flow — react windows and Summon: Draw 1 included.
Playing it from the Exhaust removes it from the pile — the per-Wyrm discount on other copies shrinks by 1.
Cards burned to the Exhaust by overdraw also count as discarded Wyrms — the pile is the pile.
Summon: Draw 1 fires after the summon resolves (Window B); a full hand overdraw-burns the drawn card.
